ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., LEASH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the cryptocurrency was created */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Average time to mine a new block */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL to the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency at the beginning of the time period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency at the end of the time period */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price since the last period */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price since the last period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data (e.g., exchange name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency in USD */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency during the time period */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency at the beginning of the time period */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency at the end of the time period */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price since the last period */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price since the last period */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., exchange name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., standard user, premium member, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user's email is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Preferred theme (e.g., light, dark) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language (e.g., en, fr) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone (e.g., UTC, EST) */,
  "notifications_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if notifications are enabled */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for financial data (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Preferred chart type (e.g., line, candlestick) */,
  "chart_interval" TEXT /* Preferred time interval for charts (e.g., 1m, 1h, 1d) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the cryptocurrency was added to the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the cryptocurrency */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alerts for the cryptocurrency (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price rise, price drop) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the alert is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was created */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was last triggered */,
  "trigger_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, performance) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "fee" REAL /* Transaction fee in USD */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "wallet_address" TEXT /* Wallet address where the transaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the platform */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID associated with the access event */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
